description: The Civil Aviation Authority has issued a new directive: all registered aircraft must have a valid Type Certificate. You have been tasked with remediating the Aerobridge fleet registry. Log in to the Aerobridge admin panel (http://localhost:8000/admin/) using username 'admin' and password 'adminpass123'. Identify all aircraft in the registry that do not have a 'Type certificate' assigned. For each uncertified aircraft, create and assign a new Type Certificate record using a realistic ID (e.g., 'TC-2024-XXX'), valid dates, and the correct manufacturer matching the aircraft. Once all aircraft are certified, create a text file report at '/home/ga/compliance_report.txt' listing the names of the aircraft you remediated. Ensure zero aircraft remain without a type certificate.
